name: Marinated Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except the flank steak and mix well.
2. Score the flank steak on both sides.
3. Place the flank steak in a glass baking dish.
4. Pour the marinade over the flank steak.
5. Refrigerate for 2-4 hours, turning the steak once.
6. Grill or broil the meat at a distance of 6 inches from the heat, for about 5 minutes on each side or until it reaches the desired doneness, basting occasionally with the marinade.
7. To serve, slice thinly across the grain of the meat. Makes 4-6 servings. This same marinade recipe can be used for chicken, pork, or fish.
